message:
test(console): add TestConsole assertion failure and edge-case tests

Expand test_console.rs coverage with tests that verify panic messages
and edge-case behavior:

- test_matches_invalid_regex_returns_false: invalid regex pattern
  returns false instead of panicking
- test_assert_contains_failure_includes_output: panic message includes
  the actual console output for debugging
- test_assert_not_contains_failure_includes_output: same for the
  negative assertion
- test_assert_line_count_success_and_failure: verifies both the passing
  path and that the panic message includes expected vs actual counts
- test_debug_print_executes: smoke test for debug_print method
- test_debug_impls: verifies Debug output for TestConsole and
  BufferWriter includes identifying information

Introduces panic_message helper for extracting String or &str payloads
from catch_unwind results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
